papers_mined.title: Sand Mandala Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Tibetan Buddhist sand mandala: created over days, ceremonially destroyed; deity syllables removed in specific order; sand swept from edge to center; cast into water.

papers_mined.title: Tibetan Sand Mandala Short History MIA

papers_mined.title: Sand Mandala Namgyal Monastery
